_comment: Worked example of the triageReferral produced from the lower-back attributionReport (ADR-2605312700, lexicon com.etzhayyim.kizashi.triageReferral). Demonstrates G3 (kizashi can only REFER — targetActor ∈ {mitate,iyashi,kokoro}, never self-treats) + G5 (emergencyFlag present; false here = routine). The target actor ingests this record via pull (mitate.emergencyEscalation.intakeUri / kokoro.acuteCrisisEscalationLog.detectionSourceCid for emergencies). NOT real member data.
